Class SequentViewLogicPrinter

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.pp.LogicPrinter
de.uka.ilkd.key.pp.SequentViewLogicPrinter
public class SequentViewLogicPrinter extends LogicPrinter
Subclass of LogicPrinter used in GUI. Any GUI-specific code for pretty-printing should be put in here, so that code of LogicPrinter stays independent of GUI as much as possible.

    • purePrinter

      public static SequentViewLogicPrinter purePrinter(NotationInfo notationInfo, Services services, VisibleTermLabels visibleTermLabels)
      Creates a SequentViewLogicPrinter that does not create a position table.
      Parameters:
      notationInfo - the NotationInfo for the concrete syntax
      services - The Services object
      visibleTermLabels - the visible term labels

    • purePrinter

      public static SequentViewLogicPrinter purePrinter(int lineWidth, NotationInfo notationInfo, Services services, VisibleTermLabels visibleTermLabels)
      Creates a SequentViewLogicPrinter that does not create a position table.
      Parameters:
      lineWidth - line width
      notationInfo - the NotationInfo for the concrete syntax
      services - The Services object
      visibleTermLabels - the visible term labels

    • positionPrinter

      public static SequentViewLogicPrinter positionPrinter(NotationInfo notationInfo, Services services, VisibleTermLabels visibleTermLabels)
      Creates a SequentViewLogicPrinter that creates a position table.
      Parameters:
      notationInfo - the NotationInfo for the concrete syntax
      services - The Services object
      visibleTermLabels - the visible term labels

    • getVisibleTermLabels

      protected ImmutableArray<TermLabel> getVisibleTermLabels(JTerm t)
      Description copied from class: LogicPrinter
      Determine the Set of labels that will be printed out for a specific JTerm. The class SequentViewLogicPrinter overrides this method. TermLabel visibility can be configured via GUI, see de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.actions.TermLabelMenu. Default is to print all TermLabels.
      Overrides:
      getVisibleTermLabels in class LogicPrinter
      Parameters:
      t - JTerm whose visible TermLabels will be determined.
      Returns:
      List of visible TermLabels, i.e. labels that are syntactically added to a JTerm while printing.

    • printClassName

      public void printClassName(String className)
      Overrides:
